# STRAT.006 ? Love and Logic

**Type:** PHILOSOPHY
**Category:** strategic_frameworks
**Subcategory:** parenting_educational
**Domain:** PARENTING_EDUCATIONAL
**Status:** active

## Core Principles
Natural consequences; choices within limits; empathy then consequences; shared control; thinking words not fighting words

## Application
Give choices within boundaries; allow natural consequences; empathetic response to mistakes; share control appropriately; avoid power struggles through empathy

## Key Values
- Natural consequences
- Empathy
- Shared control
- Choice within limits
- Learning from mistakes

## Tags
philosophy, strategic-framework, parenting_educational
